rules.rule: Every component must serve one and only one purpose.
Name every artifact by what it is, not how it works.
Every layer must depend only on the layer directly below it — never skip layers.
Every public member must be testable without modification.
Expose only what callers need; hide all implementation details.
All business rules must live in a service, never in a controller or broker.
Code must communicate intent clearly without requiring comments.
Favour small, composable units over large monolithic implementations.
Separate what changes frequently from what stays stable.
